tests.test_name: TestNG - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a single TestNG test fixture and verifies that the analysis produces valid, fully-resolved JSON output containing at least one named test.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: TestNG - PO - single test, core output structure
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'testng' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'testng_single_sample.java', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, contains 1 or more tests, and every test has a non-empty test_name

tests.test_name: TestNG - PO - DataProvider expands one test per row
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a data-driven TestNG fixture and verifies that the DataProvider causes each data row to be expanded into its own named test entry in the JSON output.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: TestNG - PO - DataProvider expands one test per row
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'testng' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'testng_datadriven_sample.java', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, contains 3 or more tests (one per DataProvider row), and every test has a non-empty test_name

tests.test_name: TestNG - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a single TestNG test fixture and verifies that the analysis produces valid JSON output where the first test includes a populated coverage matrix.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: TestNG - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'testng' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'testng_single_sample.java', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, contains 1 or more tests with non-empty test_name, and the first test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array

tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a data-driven TestNG fixture and verifies that the DataProvider rows collapse into a single test entry whose coverage matrix rows match the data set and conform to the generic schema.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'testng' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'testng_datadriven_sample.java', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, contains exactly 1 test with a non-empty test_name; coverage matrix row count matches the DataProvider examples and rows conform to the generic schema
